responsibilities: Build usable, reliable software that makes a real difference in healthcare
Build mobile apps with React Native or Swift/Kotlin
Build backend services using Python, TypeScript, or Go with REST APIs
Work closely with product, design, and research to turn ideas into prototypes and production features
Thoughtfully integrate AI services where they add value
Own features end-to-end from architecture and implementation to testing, deployment on OpenShift, and ongoing monitoring
Actively contribute to the discovery, development and delivery of products to patients and customers
analysis.culture: The company fosters a collaborative and fast-paced environment focused on building usable, reliable software that makes a real difference in healthcare. They value rapid iteration, open learning, and cross-disciplinary collaboration, working closely with product, design, and research. There's an emphasis on end-to-end ownership, thoughtful integration of AI, and balancing speed with quality through reviews and tests. Boehringer Ingelheim supports a healthy working environment, meaningful work, mobility, networking, and work-life balance, seeking dynamic, adaptable individuals eager to learn and contribute holistically.
